sessions.lever: volatile MMIO pointer ((volatile u16*)(D_800A2CDC + 0x1AA)) — fixes the load-delay nop + $2/$3 swap; residual is the +0x1AA addiu vs displacement addressing

reviewer.evidence: candidate.c uses `*(volatile u16 *)(D_800A2CDC + 0x1AA)` — the legitimate MMIO hardware-register-access category (SPU register at base+0x1AA), same as the spu_WriteReg match committed this session and the existing src/main.c precedent. volatile_cheats detector reports CLEAN; no pins, no asm, no dead vars. Floor improvement 15->7, clean.

remaining_gap.summary: candidate.c (volatile u16* pointing at D_800A2CDC + 0x1AA) reaches sandbox 7 (from 15): the volatile correctly reproduces target's load-delay nop after `lw v0,D_800A2CDC` and the $2/$3 (v0/v1) register assignment. The ONLY residual is build_insns 54 vs target 52: GCC materializes the full address `D_800A2CDC + 0x1AA` (an extra `addiu v0,v0,426` per case, ~3 insns, store uses `sh v1,0(v0)`) where target keeps the BASE in $v0 and uses displacement (`lhu v1,426(v0)` / `sh v1,426(v0)`).
remaining_gap.rules_required_for_full_match: 2 reg-swaps ($2<->$3), 1 nop insert, 1 reorder — the volatile candidate retires ALL of these EXCEPT it trades them for the +0x1AA addiu insns. Need volatile-base-with-displacement to close the last ~3.

next_hypotheses: The CORE tension (GCC 2.7.2): a `volatile u16 *p` pointing at BASE (D_800A2CDC, no +0x1AA) is CSE-hoisted across the 3 cases -> collapses to 42 insns (score 20); only `(volatile u16*)(BASE + 0x1AA)` keeps per-case loads (54) but adds the addiu. Need a form that keeps per-case base loads AND folds +0x1AA into the lhu/sh displacement.

A `*(volatile u16*)(p + 0x1AA)` deref-cast on a non-volatile (u8* or s32) base does NOT make the access volatile in GCC 2.7.2 (measured 15, no effect) — the volatile must be on the dereferenced POINTER TYPE of a pointer VARIABLE. So the displacement form needs the BASE pointer itself volatile-qualified without hoist-collapsing.

split-read-defeats-hoist angle: force the 3 D_800A2CDC reads to stay per-case (they're a non-volatile global pointer; target loads it per-branch) WITHOUT the +0x1AA full-address materialization. Maybe a per-case distinct base expression.
If GCC genuinely can't keep base+displacement+per-case+volatile together, this is a narrow codegen limit -> small residual canonical-asm or accept the 7-floor WIP for a future toolchain-savvy pass.

rejected_forms.form: `(volatile u16*)D_800A2CDC` base ptr + `[0xD5]` index (or `*(p+0xD5)`, or reload base into local first)
rejected_forms.reason: Collapses to 42 insns — GCC CSE-hoists the base-pointer load across all 3 cases (target keeps them per-case). Clean but structurally wrong.

rejected_forms.form: `*(volatile u16*)(p + 0x1AA)` deref-cast with non-volatile `u8 *p` (or `volatile u8 *p`) base
rejected_forms.reason: No effect — GCC 2.7.2 does not treat the deref-cast as volatile; identical to the non-volatile baseline (nop still missing, $2/$3 still swapped).
